channel.title: Researches on Anirudh Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Researches on Anirudh Vemula

item.title: Research
item.description: Browse my research either using the Projects page or the publications listed below. Publications Conference Publications Anirudh Vemula, Wen Sun, J. Andrew Bagnell. Contrasting Exploration in Parameter and Action Space: A Zeroth Order Optimization Perspective. Proceedings of the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS). 2019 (pdf, code, webpage) Anirudh Vemula, Katharina Muelling, Jean Oh. Social Attention: Modeling Attention in Human Crowds. Proceedings of the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA).
